name: ai-starter-kit
description: Portable starter kit for shared agents, reusable skills, and thin multi-host adapters.

interface.shortDescription: Starter kit for reusable agents, skills, rules, context, and delivery workflows
interface.longDescription: Use AI starter kit to bootstrap agent-driven delivery flows with shared role packages, reusable skills, thin adapters, and portable context across Codex and other coding assistants.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the starter kit routing map, choose the right agent, and apply the matching skills, rules, and context for this task
